# revoke

**Type Property**

The revocation of the file system object.

## Declaration

```swift
static let revoke: DispatchSource.FileSystemEvent
```

## File System Event Flags

- **all**: All changes related to the file system object.
- **attrib**: Changes to the metadata of the file system object.
- **delete**: The deletion of the file system object.
- **extend**: Changes to the size of the file system object.
- **funlock**: The unlocking of the file system object.
- **link**: Changes to the link count of the file system object.
- **rename**: Changes to the name of the file system object.
- **write**: The writing of data to the file system object.
